step_rationale: Prothrombotic lipid metabolism enzyme driving platelet activation.
mechanism: 12-LOX catalyzes arachidonic acid metabolism toward pro-thrombotic lipid mediators that amplify platelet response.

references.title: The potential effective components from Danlou tablet attenuates acute myocardial infarction by restoring ALOX12-mediated perturbed oxylipins.
Platelet ACKR3/CXCR7 favors antiplatelet lipids over an atherothrombotic lipidome and regulates thromboinflammation.
